title: Enbridge Plans $400M B.C. Pipeline Expansion Amid Tariff Tensions
content: Enbridge Inc. is expanding its B.C. pipeline network with a $400 million project to boost gas supply by 2028. Amid U.S. tariffs on Canadian energy, industry leaders push for export growth, while environmentalists oppose more fossil fuel infrastructure. Despite trade tensions, Enbridge remains focused on expansion, investing $2 billion in its Mainline system to strengthen its role in North American energy markets.
author: Analysts Account
